meta.title: TABYS Audit & Consulting | Accounting consulting in the UAE
meta.description: A multilingual TABYS landing page for bookkeeping, VAT, corporate tax, and financial consulting services.

hero.title: Reliable books, transparent reporting, calmer business decisions.
hero.description: TABYS helps founders and companies manage accounting, prepare tax reporting, and make financial decisions with clear numbers.

trust.title: Clear processes
trust.text: We define tasks, deadlines, and ownership so accounting stays organized.

trust.title: Regulatory alignment
trust.text: Mock support for VAT, Corporate Tax, ESR, and essential compliance checks.

trust.title: Transparent communication
trust.text: Reports and updates in plain language, focused on decisions.

trust.title: End-to-end support
trust.text: From initial bookkeeping setup to recurring reporting and consultations.

industries.title: We work with companies across industries

process.title: A fast and calm onboarding process

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: We hold an intro call, collect context, and define required documents.

steps.title: Work plan
steps.text: We prepare a roadmap with timelines, ownership, and pricing.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.text: We launch the accounting cadence, regular reports, and advisory support.

contact.title: Let's discuss your company's accounting and taxes
contact.text: Send us a request, and we will help you choose the right starting point: bookkeeping cleanup, ongoing support, or tax advisory.

footer.text: TABYS Audit & Consulting. Accounting consulting and business support.
